findingDetails.title: Dispatch receipts cannot authenticate across the workflow process boundary
findingDetails.evidence: The random module-scoped signing secret exists only in the standalone dispatch process; fresh-process verification of the live iteration-1 receipt returned false.
findingDetails.recommendation: Share verification authority through a trusted process boundary and add a cross-process end-to-end test.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Workflow wiring, tests, and live receipt replay show no key handoff across processes.

claimAdjudication.claim: An authentic dispatch receipt produced by the auto workflow cannot be verified by a fresh post-dispatch validator process.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Inspected workflow wiring and receipt tests and replayed the live receipt from a fresh process; no key handoff exists.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Validation could share the producer process, but the YAML dispatch command exits first.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Production proves one module instance spans dispatch and validation or identifies protected key handoff.

findingDetails.title: The advertised permissions gate is not connected to executor dispatch
findingDetails.evidence: Only definitions and tests call the gate; active OpenCode dispatch bypasses permissions and has no trusted workspace mutation reconciliation.
findingDetails.recommendation: Wire enforcement to dispatch/tool execution and add before/after allowed-write verification.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact repository search found no production evaluator caller or post-dispatch mutation gate.

claimAdjudication.claim: Deep-review executor dispatch has no runtime-enforced packet write boundary despite cataloguing a shipped pre-dispatch permissions gate.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched all .opencode code and YAML for evaluator calls and runtime workspace mutation checks; only definitions and tests were found.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: An external orchestrator may eventually call the library, but the active workflow does not and the catalog says shipped.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A production caller is shown to intercept every executor tool call or a trusted mutation gate rejects out-of-packet writes.

results.summary: Receipt authority and write-boundary claims were checked against active workflow wiring.
F009 is catalogued as shipped, but no production dispatch caller exists.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Security review spans shared executor, validation, workflow, and state-safety boundaries.

targetSelection.selectionReason: These files produce executor commands, authenticate dispatch, and claim write-boundary enforcement.

searchLedger.invariant: A receipt produced by executor dispatch must verify at the later post-dispatch gate.

searchActions.result: Producer secret is module-local and dispatch command exits before validation.

searchActions.queryOrPath: iteration-1 intent receipt in fresh tsx process

searchLedger.rationale: Cross-process verification fails for an authentic live receipt.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Prompt-only write boundaries permit out-of-packet mutation.

searchActions.result: Only definitions and unit tests found.
Branch passes --dangerously-skip-permissions and documents prompt-only containment.

searchLedger.rationale: The advertised gate is disconnected from the active executor boundary.

searchLedger.invariant: Untrusted prompt/model values must not be shell-interpreted.

searchActions.result: Commands use argv arrays without shell:true; prompt remains one argument.

searchLedger.rationale: No shell interpolation exists at the reviewed dispatch boundary.

searchLedger.invariant: Receipt signing authority must not reach the executor child.

searchActions.result: Secret is module-scoped and non-native child environment is allowlisted.

searchLedger.rationale: No child-visible key path was identified.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Source and end-to-end child visibility test agree.
